note: Created integration_test/e2e_journeys_test.dart with 13 tests across 4 critical user journeys running against the E2E Docker Compose backend: (1) launch app and see today's active events, (2) tap event card and verify detail screen with buffs/features/time, (3) flag event and verify persistence across tab navigation and detail screen, (4) view upcoming events grouped by day. Uses buildTestApp helper pointed at localhost:5001.
